title: Obliteration
description:
A zombie apocalypse mod. For 1.20.1.

Full of action packed adventures and more!
body:
A zombie apocalypse mod!

- Adds a geiger counter, it searches for any radioation blocks or biomes.
- A custom Ultimate radiation Battery Box Power Bank.
- Lithium radiation batteries for the geiger counter. Can be recharged in the power bank
- And much more:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Radioation suits.
New enemies.
Labs.
Mutations.
Custom player and entity animations!

</details>
